BackstoryDef.title: Slave Girl
BackstoryDef.description: Not long after her birth, the town where she lived was conquered by the Empire. She became an orphan and was taken away by the Empire to be raised in a slave orphanage. After learning to read and speak, she was sent to serve an Imperial noble as a slave. Among many slaves, she was the lowest, used only for abuse and mistreatment. After years of abuse by her former master, following his death, she was taken away by a merchant and brought to you. Your story with her is about to begin.
